TopModule.BindInstances: desc_count_2_fu_238_p2 add_ln94_fu_265_p2 add_ln43_fu_352_p2 add_ln114_fu_367_p2 add_ln114_1_fu_382_p2 control_s_axi_U gmem0_m_axi_U gmem2_m_axi_U gmem_desc_m_axi_U

field.name: Enable
field.description: Master enable for the device interrupt output to the system interrupt controller: 0 = Disabled, 1 = Enabled

field.name: CHAN0_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 0 (ap_done) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 0 interrupt, 1 = Channel 0 interrupt.

field.name: CHAN1_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 1 (ap_ready) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 1 interrupt, 1 = Channel 1 interrupt.

table.keys: Interface, Data Width (SW->HW), Address Width, Latency, Offset, Register, Max Widen Bitwidth, Max Read Burst Length, Max Write Burst Length, Num Read Outstanding, Num Write Outstanding, Resource Estimate
Interface, Data Width, Address Width, Offset, Register
Interface, Register, Offset, Width, Access, Description, Bit Fields
table.column: GIER, 0x04, 32, RW, Global Interrupt Enable Register, 0=Enable
IP_IER, 0x08, 32, RW, IP Interrupt Enable Register, 0=CHAN0_INT_EN 1=CHAN1_INT_EN
IP_ISR, 0x0c, 32, RW, IP Interrupt Status Register, 0=CHAN0_INT_ST 1=CHAN1_INT_ST
desc_mem_1, 0x10, 32, W, Data signal of desc_mem,
desc_mem_2, 0x14, 32, W, Data signal of desc_mem,
data_mem0_1, 0x1c, 32, W, Data signal of data_mem0,

data_mem2_2, 0x38, 32, W, Data signal of data_mem2,
first_desc_addr_1, 0x40, 32, W, Data signal of first_desc_addr,
first_desc_addr_2, 0x44, 32, W, Data signal of first_desc_addr,
max_descriptors, 0x4c, 32, W, Data signal of max_descriptors,

table.keys: Argument, HW Interface, HW Type, HW Usage, HW Info

section.name: M_AXI Burst Information
section.HEADER_NOTE: Note: All burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.

table.keys: HW Interface, Direction, Length, Width, Loop, Loop Location
HW Interface, Variable, Access Location, Direction, Burst Status, Length, Loop, Loop Location, Resolution, Problem
table.column: data_mem0, /work/shared/users/phd/sk3463/projects/helloworld/hbm_simple_xrt/src/krnl_vadd_desc.cpp:122:41, read, Widen Fail, , data_transfer_loop, /work/shared/users/phd/sk3463/projects/helloworld/hbm_simple_xrt/src/krnl_vadd_desc.cpp:114:9, 214-353, Could not widen since type i512 size is greater than or equal to the max_widen_bitwidth threshold of 512

data_mem2, /work/shared/users/phd/sk3463/projects/helloworld/hbm_simple_xrt/src/krnl_vadd_desc.cpp:122:41, write, Widen Fail, , data_transfer_loop, /work/shared/users/phd/sk3463/projects/helloworld/hbm_simple_xrt/src/krnl_vadd_desc.cpp:114:9, 214-353, Could not widen since type i512 size is greater than or equal to the max_widen_bitwidth threshold of 512
